issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not valid. Should be 'OnKO' (character would be KO'd)
Condition does not match card text. Should check for Egghead type Character, not 'HasCardOnBoard' with specific name
Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect. Should be 'FlipLife' (turn 1 card from Life cards face-up) with target count of 1
Effect does not prevent KO; it replaces the KO with a Life card flip. This is a reactive replacement effect triggered by opponent's effect causing KO
